jobs.title: General Arrangement Design for Custom Heat Exchanger
jobs.description:
I need a complete General Arrangement Drawing for a custom‐built heat exchanger that must meet ASME requirements. This is not a standard shell-and-tube, plate, or air-cooled unit; the configuration is unique to the process, so I’m looking for someone who can translate my process data and preliminary sketches into a clear, fabrication-ready layout.

The drawing has to indicate all critical overall and nozzle dimensions, support details, lifting points, weld seams, and space envelopes for maintenance. I work in AutoCAD, so a DWG file accompanied by a clean PDF is essential. If you normally add a

jobs.title: Nepal Economy Policy News Article
jobs.description:
I need a concise, timely news piece that explains how current Nepali government policies are shaping the national economy. The story should read like something pulled from a reputable daily—fact-checked, balanced, and anchored in recent legislative or regulatory moves.  

Please weave in quotes or data from credible sources such as ministry releases, the Nepal Rastra Bank, or recognised think-tanks, and clarify what the policies mean for businesses, consumers, and overall growth. A neutral journalistic tone is essential; no opinion writing or promotional language.  

Deliverables  
• 800–1,000

jobs.description:

jobs.title: Redraw Plan & Door Update
jobs.description:
I’ll send you a PDF of my existing house plan. Please trace it faithfully into CAD, then swap out one specific door according to the size and specs I’ll provide. Once the drawing is updated, prepare a clear quantity schedule that lists every door and window in the project with their exact dimensions.

Deliverables:
• Editable CAD file (DWG or compatible) reflecting the redraw and the single door replacement  
• Print-ready PDF of the updated plan  
• Door and window schedule in XLS or PDF format, showing counts and sizes

Accuracy in the redraw and consistency between the plan and the schedule
